---
title: "Sarah Westcombe"
---

## Sarah Westcombe

**Dates:** (b.1759)

**Maiden name:** (Kingsman)

### Description

great-aunt of CMY

### Biography

Younger sister of CMY\'s grandmother, she married (1784) Nicholas Westcombe and had a son, the Rev. Thomas Westcombe.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
